key.name: switch
key.description: Switch to enable extension logic when plugged in

key.name: time
key.description: Time in seconds to blank the screen after locking when on AC power. 0 means never

key.name: switch-battery
key.description: Switch to enable extension logic when running on battery

key.name: time-battery
key.description: Time in seconds to blank the screen after locking when on battery. 0 means never

key.name: power
key.description: Only disable custom behavior when running on battery
